falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 10% or more from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish breakout rather than a continuation of the current pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score exceeds 50 (current score: 39) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 would confirm a strong reversal pattern, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict and suggesting a major top rather than a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 14-day average within 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A massive volume spike would indicate extreme market participation, falsifying the 'HOLD' signal by proving a decisive price move is underway.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
